steps.title: Describe the poem's format
steps.content: The prompt asks for the format of 5 haiku (for Sarah Vaughan), meaning the poem's structure. The relevant note says the poem is written as a sequence of five haiku.

steps.title: Reject nonformat details
steps.content: Choice A makes a broader claim about poems in Morning Haiku instead of the named poem. Choice C gives publication and thematic information, not format. Choice D explains Sanchez's reason for using haiku, not the structure of this poem. The answer is B.
